channel.title: qinwf/awesome-R Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 11th, 2021
item.description:
Web Technologies and Services

  • golem - A framework for building production-grade Shiny apps.

    • Graphic Displays

  • httpgdstars106 - Asynchronous http server graphics device for R.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • corporaexplorer - Dynamic exploration of text collections

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 26th, 2020
item.description:
Data Formats

  • arrow - An interface to the Arrow C++ library.
  • feather stars2.5k - Fast, interoperable binary data frame storage for Python, R, and more powered by Apache Arrow.
  • fst - Lightning Fast Serialization of Data Frames for R.
  • havenstars331 - Improved methods to import SPSS, Stata and SAS files in R.
  • jsonlitestars279 - A robust and quick way to parse JSON files in R.
  • qsstars232 - Quick serialization of R objects.
  • readxl - Read excel files (.xls and .xlsx) into R.
  • readr stars830 - A fast and friendly way to read tabular data into R.
  • riostars477 - A Swiss-Army Knife for Data I/O.
  • readODSstars39 - Read OpenDocument Spreadsheets into R as data.frames.
  • RcppTOMLstars23 - Rcpp Bindings to C++ parser for TOML files.
  • vroomstars478 - Fast reading of delimited files.
  • writexl - Portable, light-weight data frame to xlsx exporter for R.
  • yamlstars107 - R package for converting objects to and from YAML.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 18th, 2020
item.description:
2020

  • lightgbm - Light Gradient Boosting Machine.
  • torch - Tensors and Neural Networks with 'GPU' Acceleration.

    • Language API

  • reticulate - Interface to 'Python'.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 20th, 2020
item.description:
High Performance

  • cpp11stars133 - cpp11 is a header-only R package that helps R package developers handle R objects with C++ code. It's similar to Rcpp but with different design trade-offs and features.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Lists

  • Posts - Great R blog posts or Rticles.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 9th, 2020
item.description:
Data Packages

  • RCOBOLDIstars9 - Import COBOL CopyBook data files directly into R as properly structured data frames. Package builds are available via Dratstars0 and DockerHub.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 11th, 2020
item.description:
2020

  • VSCode - vscode-R + vscode-r-lsp VSCode R Langauage Support
  • gtstars1.3k - Easily generate information-rich, publication-quality tables from R

    • Integrated Development Environments

  • VSCode - vscode-R + vscode-r-lsp VSCode R Langauage Support

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 4th, 2020
item.description:
Database Management

  • reduxstars60 - Redis client for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Mar 7th, 2020
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • radian stars927 (formerly rtichoke) - A modern R console with syntax highlighting.
  • RStudio - A powerful and productive user interface for R. Works great on Windows, Mac, and Linux.
  • IRkernel stars1.4k - R kernel for Jupyter.

    • 2018

  • fablestars410 - univariate and multivariate time series forecasting models
  • r2d3 - R Interface to D3 Visualizations
  • rstats-edstars423 - List of courses teaching R
  • promises - Abstractions for Promise-Based Asynchronous Programming
  • tinytex - A lightweight and easy-to-maintain LaTeX distribution
  • Readings in Applied Data Sciencestars1.6k - These readings reflect Hadley's personal thoughts about applied data science.

    • 2017

  • prophetstars12.7k - Tool for producing high quality forecasts for time series data that has multiple seasonality with linear or non-linear growth.
  • tidyversestars1k - Easily install and load packages from the tidyverse
  • purrrstars961 - A functional programming toolkit for R
  • hrbrthemesstars916 - 🔏 Opinionated, typographic-centric ggplot2 themes and theme components
  • xaringanstars1.2k - Create HTML5 slides with R Markdown and the JavaScript library
  • blogdownstars1.4k - Create Blogs and Websites with R Markdown
  • gluestars523 - Glue strings to data in R. Small, fast, dependency free interpreted string literals.
  • covrstars287 - Test coverage reports for R
  • lintrstars839 - Static Code Analysis for R
  • reprexstars572 - Render bits of R code for sharing, e.g., on GitHub or StackOverflow.
  • reticulatestars1.3k - R Interface to Python
  • tensorflowstars1.2k - TensorFlow for R
  • utf8stars99 - Manipulating and printing UTF-8 text that fixes multiple bugs in R's UTF-8 handling.
  • Patchworkstars1.9k - Combine separate ggplots into the same graphic.

    • Syntax

  • magrittr stars847 - Let's pipe it.

    • Data Manipulation

  • dplyr stars3.7k - Fast data frames manipulation and database query.
  • data.table stars2.7k - Fast data manipulation in a short and flexible syntax.
  • reshape2 stars198 - Flexible rearrange, reshape and aggregate data.
  • broom stars11 - Convert statistical analysis objects into tidy data frames.
  • stringi stars210 - ICU based string processing package.
  • stringr stars412 - Consistent API for string processing, built on top of stringi.

    • Graphic Displays

  • ggplot2 stars4.9k - An implementation of the Grammar of Graphics.
  • idendrostars5 - interactive exploration of dendrograms (trees of hierarchical clustering).

    • HTML Widgets

  • DiagrammeR stars1.4k - Create JS graph diagrams and flowcharts in R.
  • formattable stars616 - Formattable Data Structures.
  • ggvis stars700 - Interactive grammar of graphics for R.
  • plotly stars2k - Interactive ggplot2 and Shiny plotting with plot.ly.
  • rCharts stars1.2k - Interactive JS Charts from R.
  • echarts4rstars391 - R wrapper to Echarts version 4

    • Reproducible Research

  • knitr stars2.1k - Easy dynamic report generation in R.
  • rmarkdown - Dynamic documents for R.
  • slidify stars847 - Generate reproducible html5 slides from R markdown.
  • kable - Build fancy HTML or 'LaTeX' tables using 'kable()' from 'knitr'.
  • texregstars87 - Formatting statistical models in LaTex and HTML.

    • Web Technologies and Services

  • shiny stars4.2k - Easy interactive web applications with R. See also awesome-rshinystars547
  • httr stars901 - User-friendly RCurl wrapper.
  • XML - Tools for parsing and generating XML within R.
  • xml2 - Optimized tools for parsing and generating XML within R.
  • rvest stars1.3k - Simple web scraping for R, using CSSSelect or XPath syntax.
  • OpenCPU - HTTP API for R handling concurrent calls, based on the Apache2 web server, to expose R code as REST web services and create full-sized, multi-page web applications.

    • Parallel Computing

  • foreach - Executing the loop in parallel.
  • future - A minimal, efficient, cross-platform unified Future API for parallel and distributed processing in R; designed for beginners as well as advanced developers.
  • SparkR stars645 - R frontend for Spark.

    • High Performance

  • Rcpp - Rcpp provides a powerful API on top of R, make function in R extremely faster.

    • Machine Learning

  • AnomalyDetection stars3.3k - AnomalyDetection R package from Twitter.

    • Bayesian

  • rstan - R interface to the Stan MCMC software.

    • Finance

  • quantmod - Quantitative Financial Modelling & Trading Framework for R.
  • zoo - S3 Infrastructure for Regular and Irregular Time Series.

    • Bioinformatics and Biostatistics

  • Bioconductor - Tools for the analysis and comprehension of high-throughput genomic data.

    • Network Analysis

  • igraph - A collection of network analysis tools.
  • tidygraphstars409 - A tidy API for graph manipulation

    • R Development

  • devtools stars2.1k - Tools to make an R developer's life easier.
  • testthat stars5 - An R package to make testing fun.
  • R6 stars316 - simpler, faster, lighter-weight alternative to R's built-in classes.
  • pryr stars188 - Make it easier to understand what's going on in R.
  • roxygen stars446 - Describe your functions in comments next to their definitions.
  • Rocker - R configurations for Docker.

    • Learning R

  • swirl - An interactive R tutorial directly in your R console.
  • DataScienceR stars1.7k - a list of R tutorials for Data Science, NLP and Machine Learning.

    • Books

    Free and Online

  • Advanced R, 2nd ed. by Hadley Wickham (2019) - An online version of the Advanced R book.
  • R for Data Science by Garrett Grolemund & Hadley Wickham - Free book from RStudio developers with emphasis on data science workflow.
  • R Cookbook by Winston Chang - A problem-oriented online book that supports his R Graphics Cookbook, 2nd ed. (2018).
  • R Packages, 2nd ed. by Hadley Wickham & Jennifer Bryan - A book (in paper and website formats) on writing R packages.
  • R for SAS and SPSS users by Bob Muenchen (2012) - An excellent resource for users already familiar with SAS or SPSS.
  • Introduction to Statistical Learning with Application in R by Gareth James et al. (2017) - A simplified and "operational" version of The Elements of Statistical Learning. Free softcopy provided by its authors.
  • The R Inferno by Patrick Burns (2011) - Patrick Burns gives insight into R's ins and outs along with its quirks!
  • Efficient R Programming by Colin Gillespie & Robin Lovelace (2017) - An online version of the O’Reilly book: Efficient R Programming.
  • The R Programming Wikibook - A collaborative handbook for R.

    • Spatial

  • tmapstars518 - R package for thematic maps

    • Data Packages

  • wbstats - Tools for searching and downloading data and statistics from the World Bank Data API and the World Bank Data Catalog API.
  • ICONstars2 - complex systems & networks datasets from the Index of COmplex Networks (ICON) database webpage.

    • Websites

    Manuals

  • An Introduction to R - A very good introductory text on R, also covers some advanced topic. See also the Manuals section on CRAN
  • CRAN Contributed Docs - CRAN Contributed Documentation in many languages.
  • Quick-R - An excellent quick reference

    • Websites

    Tools and References

  • CRAN Task Views - Task Views for CRAN packages.

    • Websites

    News and Info

  • R Weekly - Weekly updates about R and Data Science. R Weekly is openly developed on GitHub.
  • R Bloggers - There are people scattered across the Web who blog about R. This is simply an aggregator of many of those feeds.
  • R-users - A job board for R users (and the people who are looking to hire them)

    • Books

    Paid

  • The Art of R Programming - It's a good resource for systematically learning fundamentals such as types of objects, control statements, variable scope, classes and debugging in R.
  • R Cookbook, 2nd ed. by JD Long & Paul Teetor (2019) - A quick and simple introduction to conducting many common statistical tasks with R.
  • Use R! Series by Springer - This series of inexpensive and focused books from Springer publish shorter books aimed at practitioners. Books can discuss the use of R in a particular subject area, such as Bayesian networks, ggplot2 and Rcpp.

    • Books

    Book/monograph Lists and Reviews

  • R Books Liststars168 - List of R Books.
  • Readings in Applied Data Sciencestars1.6k - These readings reflect Hadley's personal thoughts about applied data science.

    • 2019

  • ggforcestars663 - ggplot2 extension framework
  • rayshaderstars1.4k - 2D and 3D data visualizations via rgl

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Aug 26th, 2019
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Microsoft R - Revolution R would be offered free to academic users and commercial software would focus on big data, large scale multiprocessor functionality.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 10th, 2019
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • ggstatsplotstars1.2k - ggplot2 Based Plots with Statistical Details

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 27th, 2019
item.description:
Reproducible Research

  • redocstars469 - Reversible Reproducible Documents

    • Finance

  • pedquant - Public Economic Data and Quantitative Analysis

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 22nd, 2019
item.description:
R Ecosystems

  • rOpenGov Open government data, computational social science, digital humanities
  • rOpenHealth Public health data
  • rOpenSci Open science

    • Websites

    Tools and References

  • RDocumentation - Search through all CRAN, Bioconductor, Github packages and their archives with RDocumentation.
  • rdrr.io - Find R package documentation. Try R packages in your browser.
  • rnotebook.io - Create online R Jupyter Notebooks for free.

    • Other Tools

  • Conda - Most R packages are available through the Conda polyglot cross-platform dependency manager.

    • Data Manipulation

  • DataExplorerstars373 - Fast exploratory data analysis with minimum code.
  • snakecasestars109 - Automatically parse and convert strings into cases like snake or camel among others.

    • Reproducible Research

  • R Suite - A package to design flexible and reproducible deployment workflows for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 21st, 2019
item.description:
2019

  • vroomstars478 - Fast reading of delimited files

    • Spatial

  • GWmodel - Geographically-Weighted Models

    • Finance

  • scorecardstars126 - Credit Risk Scorecard

    • Graphic Displays

  • plot3D - Plotting Multi-Dimensional Data
  • plot3Drgl - Plotting Multi-Dimensional Data - Using 'rgl'

    • Reproducible Research

  • officer - An R package to generate Microsoft Word, Microsoft PowerPoint and HTML reports.
  • flextable - An R package to embed complex tables (merged cells, multi-level headers and footers, conditional formatting) in Microsoft Word, Microsoft PowerPoint and HTML reports. It cooperates with the [officer] package and integrates with [rmarkdown] reports.

    • Bioinformatics and Biostatistics

  • lme4stars433 - Generalized mixed-effects models.
  • nlme - Mixed-effects models, handling user-specified matrix of residual covariance, relevant for the anaysis of repeated observations in longitudinal trials.
  • glmmTMB - Generalized mixed-effects models, handling user-specified matrix of residual covariance, relevant for the anaysis of repeated observations in longitudinal trials.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Feb 28th, 2019
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Bio7 - An IDE contains tools for model creation, scientific image analysis and statistical analysis for ecological modelling.

    • Database Management

  • RCassandra - Direct interface (not Java) to the most basic functionality of Apache Cassandra.
  • RPostgresstars254 - an DBI-compliant interface to the postgres database.

    • Data Packages

  • gapminderstars203 - Excerpt from the Gapminder dataset (data about countries through the past 50 years).

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Feb 27th, 2019
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • anomalizestars270 - Tidy Anomaly Detection using Twitter's AnomalyDetection method.

    • Integrated Development Environments

  • Jamovi and JASP - Desktop software for both Bayesian and Frequentist methods, using a UI familiar to SPSS users.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 16th, 2018
item.description:
Spatial

  • sf - Improved Classes and Methods for Spatial Data.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 7th, 2018
item.description:
R Development

  • sinewstars127 - Generate roxygen2 skeletons populated with information scraped from the function script.

    • Web Technologies and Services

  • curlstars166 - A Modern and Flexible Web Client for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 6th, 2018
item.description:
HTML Widgets

  • heatmaplystars279 - Interactive heatmaps with D3.
  • d3heatmapstars228 - Interactive heatmaps with D3 (no longer maintained).

    • Database Management

  • odbcstars290 - Connect to ODBC databases (using the DBI interface)

    • Graphic Displays

  • Patchworkstars1.9k - Combine separate ggplots into the same graphic.
  • latticestars43 - A powerful and elegant high-level data visualization system.
  • animationstars174 - A simple way to produce animated graphics in R, using ImageMagick.
  • wafflestars629 - 🍁 Make waffle (square pie) charts in R.
  • dendextendstars125 - visualizing, adjusting and comparing trees of hierarchical clustering.

    • Data Manipulation

  • lubridatestars551 - A set of functions to work with dates and times.
  • bigmemorystars96 - Shared memory and memory-mapped matrices. The big* packages provide additional tools including linear models (biglm) and Random Forests (bigrfstars92).

    • Reproducible Research

  • tinytexstars603 - A lightweight and easy-to-maintain LaTeX distribution

    • Integrated Development Environments

  • RKWard - An extensible IDE/GUI for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 6th, 2018
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • r2d3 - R Interface to D3 Visualizations

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 19th, 2018
item.description:
R Development

  • promises - Abstractions for Promise-Based Asynchronous Programming

    • Reference Cards

  • RStudio Cheat Sheets

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 5th, 2018
item.description:
Reproducible Research

  • drakestars1.3k - An rOpenSci package for reproducible data science workflows too big for knitr.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
HTML Widgets

  • highcharterstars597 - R wrapper for highcharts based on htmlwidgets

    • Spatial

  • tigrisstars220 - Download and use Census TIGER/Line shapefiles in R

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 13th, 2017
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Vim-Rstars124 - Vim plugin for R.

    • Reproducible Research

  • brew - Pre-compute data to enhance your report templates. Can be combined with knitr.

    • High Performance

  • compiler - speeding up your R code using the JIT

    • Natural Language Processing

  • utf8stars99 - Manipulating and printing UTF-8 text that fixes multiple bugs in R's UTF-8 handling.

    • R Development

  • RStudio Addinsstars644 - List of RStudio addins.

    • Podcasts

  • Not So Standard Deviations - The Data Science Podcast.
    • @Roger Peng and @Hilary Parker.
  • R World News - R World News helps you keep up with happenings within the R community.
    • @Bob Rudis and @Jay Jacobs.
  • R Talk - News and discussions of statistical software and language R.
    • @Oliver Keyes, @Jasmine Dumas, @Ted Hart and @Mikhail Popov.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Language API

  • JuliaCallstars178 - Seamless Integration Between R and Julia.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 7th, 2017
item.description:
Database Management

  • RMariaDBstars90 - An R interface to MariaDB (a replacement for the old RMySQL package)

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 27th, 2017
item.description:
Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-rshinystars547

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 9th, 2017
item.description:
Web Technologies and Services

  • shinyjsstars574 - Easily improve the user interaction and user experience in your Shiny apps in seconds.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 21st, 2017
item.description:
Optimization

  • lpSolve - Interface to Lp_solve to Solve Linear/Integer Programs.
  • ompr - Model mixed integer linear programs in an algebraic way directly in R.
  • Rglpk - R/GNU Linear Programming Kit Interface
  • ROI - The R Optimization Infrastructure ('ROI') is a sophisticated framework for handling optimization problems in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Mar 28th, 2017
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Radiant - A platform-independent browser-based interface for business analytics in R, based on the Shiny.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Mar 27th, 2017
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • ggtechstars265 - ggplot2 tech themes and scales

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Mar 18th, 2017
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • hrbrthemesstars916 - 🔏 Opinionated, typographic-centric ggplot2 themes and theme components.

    • Podcasts

  • R Weekly - Weekly news updates about the R community.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Feb 9th, 2017
item.description:
Parallel Computing

  • batchtools - High performance computing with LSF, TORQUE, Slurm, OpenLava, SGE and Docker Swarm.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Feb 7th, 2017
item.description:
Database Management

  • RNeo4jstars236 - Neo4j graph database driver.
  • rpostgisstars59 - R interface to PostGIS database and get spatial objects in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 27th, 2016
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • tidytext - Implementing tidy principles of Hadley Wickham to text mining.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 20th, 2016
item.description:
Spatial

  • rgeos - Interface to Geometry Engine - Open Source
  • rgdal - Bindings for the Geospatial Data Abstraction Library
  • maptools - Tools for Reading and Handling Spatial Objects
  • RColorBrewer - Provides color schemes for maps
  • spdep - Spatial Dependence: Weighting Schemes, Statistics and Models

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 19th, 2016
item.description:
Spatial

  • gstatstars132 - Spatial and spatio-temporal geostatistical modelling, prediction and simulation.
  • spacetimestars53 - R classes and methods for spatio-temporal data.
  • spatstatstars130 - Spatial Point Pattern Analysis, Model-Fitting, Simulation, Tests
  • CRAN Task View: Analysis of Spatial Data- Spatial Analysis related resources.
  • Leaflet - One of the most popular JavaScript libraries interactive maps.
  • ggmapstars659 - Plotting maps in R with ggplot2.
  • REmapstars227 - R interface to the JavaScript library ECharts for interactive map data visualization.
  • sp - Classes and Methods for Spatial Data.

    • HTML Widgets

  • wordcloud2stars359 - R interface to wordcloud2.js.

    • Books

    Paid

  • Learning R Programming - Learning R as a programming language from basics to advanced topics.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 8th, 2016
item.description:
Web Technologies and Services

  • plumberstars1.2k - A library to expose existing R code as web API.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 28th, 2016
item.description:
Data Manipulation

  • tidyversestars1k - Easily install and load packages from the tidyverse.

    • Parallel Computing

  • sparklyr - R interface for Apache Spark from RStudio.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 25th, 2016
item.description:
HTML Widgets

  • timevisstars475 - Create fully interactive timeline visualizations.
  • visNetworkstars417 - Using vis.js library for network visualization.

    • Reproducible Research

  • ezknitrstars92 - Avoid the typical working directory pain when using 'knitr'

    • Network Analysis

  • visNetworkstars417 - Using vis.js library for network visualization.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
R Development

  • modulesstars2 - An alternative (Python style) module system for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 21st, 2016
item.description:
Network Analysis

  • netdiffuseRstars57 - Tools for Analysis of Network Diffusion.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 15th, 2016
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • ggfortifystars461 - A unified interface to ggplot2 popular statistical packages using one line of code.
  • corrplotstars214 - A graphical display of a correlation matrix or general matrix. It also contains some algorithms to do matrix reordering.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 14th, 2016
item.description:
Data Packages

  • engsoccerdatastars626 - English and European soccer results 1871-2016.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 7th, 2016
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • MonkeyLearnstars95 - 🐒 R package for text analysis with Monkeylearn 🐒.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 27th, 2016
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • ggtreestars518 - Visualization and annotation of phylogenetic tree.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 23rd, 2016
item.description:
R Development

  • staticdocsstars543 - Generate static html documentation for an R package.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 14th, 2016
item.description:
Reproducible Research

  • checkpointstars142 - Install packages from snapshots on the checkpoint server.

    • Network Analysis

  • rgexf - Export network objects from R to GEXF, for manipulation with network software like Gephi or Sigma.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 11th, 2016
item.description:
Web Technologies and Services

  • RSiteCatalyststars126 - R client library for the Adobe Analytics.

    • Podcasts

  • The R-Podcast - Giving practical advice on how to use R.
    • @Eric Nantz.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 5th, 2016
item.description:
Lists

  • RStudio Addinsstars644 - List of RStudio addins.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 29th, 2016
item.description:
Web Technologies and Services

  • Web Technologies Liststars160 - Information about how to use R and the world wide web together.

    • Lists

  • Package Developmentstars39 - R packages to improve package development.
  • Web Technologiesstars160 - Information about how to use R and the world wide web together.
  • Open Datastars188 - Using R to obtain, parse, manipulate, create, and share open data.

    • R Development

  • Package Development Liststars39 - R packages to improve package development.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 27th, 2016
item.description:
Lists

  • RStartHerestars638 - A guide to some of the most useful R packages, organized by workflow.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 25th, 2016
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • NLP for - NLP related resources in R. @Chinese
  • Topic Models Resourcesstars205 - Topic Models learning and R related resources.

    • Lists

  • Natural Language Processing - NLP related resources in R. @Chinese

    • Graphic Displays

  • ggplot2 Extensions - Showcases of ggplot2 extensions.

    • Network Analysis

  • Network Analysis Liststars2.4k - Network Analysis related resources.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Other Interpreters

  • CXXR - Refactorising R into C++.
  • pqR - a "pretty quick" implementation of R
  • renjin - a JVM-based interpreter for R.
  • rhostars129 - Refactor the interpreter of the R language into a fully-compatible, efficient, VM for R.
  • TERR - TIBCO Enterprise Runtime for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 19th, 2016
item.description:
Data Manipulation

  • fuzzyjoinstars549 - Join tables together on inexact matching.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 15th, 2016
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Nvim-Rstars661 - Neovim plugin for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 12th, 2016
item.description:
Lists

  • ggplot2 Extensions - Showcases of ggplot2 extensions.
  • Network Analysisstars2.4k - Network Analysis related resources.
  • R Project Conferences - Information about useR! Conferences and DSC Conferences.
  • Topic Modelsstars205 - Topic Models learning and R related resources.
  • Booksstars168 - List of R Books.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 9th, 2016
item.description:
Reproducible Research

  • bookdown - Authoring Books with R Markdown.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 1st, 2016
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • text2vecstars720 - Fast Text Mining Framework for Vectorization and Word Embeddings.
  • quantedastars659 - R functions for Quantitative Analysis of Textual Data.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Mar 11th, 2016
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • RTVS - R Tools for Visual Studio.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Feb 8th, 2016
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • gganimatestars1.7k - Create easy animations with ggplot2.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jan 27th, 2016
item.description:
Optimization

  • minqa - Derivative-free optimization algorithms by quadratic approximation.
  • nloptr - NLopt is a free/open-source library for nonlinear optimization.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • SnowballC - Snowball stemmers based on the C libstemmer UTF-8 library.

    • Other Tools

  • git2rstars172 - Gives you programmatic access to Git repositories from R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jan 7th, 2016
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • ggrepelstars872 - Repel overlapping text labels away from each other.
  • ggaltstars565 - Extra Coordinate Systems, Geoms and Statistical Transformations for ggplot2.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Nov 20th, 2015
item.description:
Parallel Computing

  • ddRstars118 - Provides distributed data structures and simplifies distributed computing in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 23rd, 2015
item.description:
Parallel Computing

  • DistributedRstars160 - A scalable high-performance platform from HP Vertica Analytics Team.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 12th, 2015
item.description:
HTML Widgets

  • scatterD3stars135 - Interactive scatterplots with D3.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Logging

  • futile.loggerstars137 - A logging package in R similar to log4j
  • log4rstars71 - A log4j derivative for R
  • logging - A logging package emulating the python logging package.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 7th, 2015
item.description:
Websites

Manuals

  • tryR - A quick course for getting started with R.

    • MOOCs

  • Explore Statistics with R - Covers introduction, data handling and statistical analysis in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 24th, 2015
item.description:
Syntax

  • purrrstars961 - A FP package for R in the spirit of underscore.js.

    • Graphic Displays

  • imager - An image processing package based on CImg library to work with images and display them.
  • misc3d - Powerful functions to deal with 3d plots, isosurfaces, etc.
  • xkcd - Use xkcd style in graphs.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 18th, 2015
item.description:
R Development

  • importstars167 - An import mechanism for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 8th, 2015
item.description:
Web Technologies and Services

  • Rfacebookstars350 - Access to Facebook API via R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 6th, 2015
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • TextMate + r.tmblundlestars23 - Add-on package for TextMate 1/2.

    • HTML Widgets

  • networkD3 - D3 JavaScript Network Graphs from R.

    • Language API

  • RcppOctavestars15 - Seamless Interface to Octave and Matlab.

    • Network Analysis

  • network - Basic tools to manipulate relational data in R.
  • sna - Basic network measures and visualization tools.
  • ndtv - Tools to construct animated visualizations of dynamic network data in various formats.
  • ergm - Exponential random graph models in R.
  • tnet - Network measures for weighted, two-mode and longitudinal networks.

    • Books

    Free and Online

  • Books written as part of the Johns Hopkins Data Science Specialization:
    • Exploratory Data Analysis with R by Roger D. Peng (2016) - Basic analytical skills for all sorts of data in R.
    • R Programming for Data Science by Roger D. Peng (2019) - More advanced data analysis that relies on R programming.
    • Report Writing for Data Science in R by Roger D. Peng (2019) - R-based methods for reproducible research and report generation.

    • Books

    Paid

  • R in Action - This book aims at all levels of users, with sections for beginning, intermediate and advanced R ranging from "Exploring R data structures" to running regressions and conducting factor analyses.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 5th, 2015
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Deducer - A Menu driven data analysis GUI with a spreadsheet like data editor.

    • HTML Widgets

  • threejsstars253 - Interactive 3D scatter plots and globes.

    • Reproducible Research

  • xtable - Export tables to LaTeX or HTML.

    • Parallel Computing

  • parallel - R started with release 2.14.0 which includes a new package parallel incorporating (slightly revised) copies of packages multicore and snow.

    • Language API

  • RinRuby - a Ruby library that integrates the R interpreter in Ruby.

    • Database Management

  • RHivestars123 - R extension facilitating distributed computing via Apache Hive.

    • Network Analysis

  • networkDynamic - Support for dynamic, (inter)temporal networks.
  • statnet - The project behind many R network analysis packages.
  • latentnet - Latent position and cluster models for network objects.

    • R Development

  • covrstars287 - Test coverage for your R package and (optionally) upload the results to coveralls or codecov.
  • lintrstars839 - Static code analysis for R to enforce code style.

    • Other Interpreters

  • fastR - FastR is an implementation of the R Language in Java atop Truffle and Graal.

    • MOOCs

  • Johns Hopkins University Data Science Specialization - 9 courses including: Introduction to R, literate analysis tools, Shiny and some more.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 1st, 2015
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • topicmodels - Topic modeling interface to the C code developed by by David M. Blei for Topic Modeling (Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA), and Correlated Topics Models (CTM)).
  • syuzhet - Extracts sentiment from text using three different sentiment dictionaries.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Aug 2nd, 2015
item.description:
HTML Widgets

  • DataTables - Displays R matrices or data frames as interactive HTML tables.
  • Leaflet - One of the most popular JavaScript libraries interactive maps.
  • MetricsGraphics - Enables easy creation of D3 scatterplots, line charts, and histograms.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 25th, 2015
item.description:
R Development

  • dratstars126 - Creation and use of R repositories on GitHub or other repos.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • ahaz - Regularization for semiparametric additive hazards regression.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jun 8th, 2015
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • LDAvisstars473 - Interactive visualization of topic models.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 28th, 2015
item.description:
High Performance

  • Rcpp11stars78 - Rcpp11 is a complete redesign of Rcpp, targetting C++11.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 9th, 2015
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Sublime Text + R-Boxstars177 - Add-on package for Sublime Text 2/3.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 8th, 2015
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • StatET - An Eclipse based IDE for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R May 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • NLP - Basic functions for Natural Language Processing.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 29th, 2015
item.description:
Database Management

  • elasticstars230 - Wrapper for the Elasticsearch HTTP API
  • mongolitestars261 - Streaming Mongo Client for R

    • MOOCs

  • HarvardX Biomedical Data Science - Introduction to R for the Life Sciences.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 28th, 2015
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • Cairo - R graphics device using cairo graphics library for creating high-quality display output.

    • Reproducible Research

  • Sweave - A package designed to write LaTeX reports using R.

    • R Development

  • installrstars225 - Functions for installing softwares from within R (for Windows).

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 25th, 2015
item.description:
Language API

  • rpy2 - Python interface for R.
  • jvmrstars14 - Integration of R, Java, and Scala.

    • Bioinformatics and Biostatistics

  • pheatmap - Pretty heatmaps made easy.

    • HTML Widgets

  • rbokeh - R Interface to Bokeh.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Apr 22nd, 2015
item.description:
Data Manipulation

  • ff - Data structures designed to store large datasets.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jan 25th, 2015
item.description:
Data Manipulation

  • rliststars154 - A toolbox for non-tabular data manipulation with lists.

    • Syntax

  • pipeRstars157 - Multi-paradigm Pipeline Implementation.
  • lambda.rstars188 - Functional programming and simple pattern matching in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jan 23rd, 2015
item.description:
Database Management

  • rmongodbstars54 - R driver for MongoDB.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jan 8th, 2015
item.description:
Language API

  • htmlwidgets - Bring the best of JavaScript data visualization to R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 8th, 2014
item.description:
Language API

  • V8stars157 - Embedded JavaScript Engine.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Dec 1st, 2014
item.description:
HTML Widgets

  • dygraphsstars319 - Charting time-series data in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Oct 20th, 2014
item.description:
Bayesian

  • rjags - R interface to the JAGS MCMC library.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Sep 8th, 2014
item.description:
Other Interpreters

  • ripostestars89 - a fast interpreter and JIT for R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Aug 8th, 2014
item.description:
Reference Cards

  • R Reference Card 2.0 - Material from R for Beginners by permission of Emmanuel Paradis (Version 2 by Matt Baggott).
  • Regression Analysis Refcard - R Reference Card for Regression Analysis.
  • Reference Card for ESS - Reference Card for ESS.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 31st, 2014
item.description:
Parallel Computing

  • Rmpi - Rmpi provides an interface (wrapper) to MPI APIs. It also provides interactive R slave environment.

    • Language API

  • rJava - Low-level R to Java interface.
  • rJython - R interface to Python via Jython.
  • rPython - Package allowing R to call Python.
  • runrstars87 - Run Julia and Bash from R.
  • RJuliastars133 - R package Call Julia.
  • R.matlab - Read and write of MAT files together with R-to-MATLAB connectivity.
  • RSPerl - A bidirectional interface for calling R from Perl and Perl from R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 30th, 2014
item.description:
Natural Language Processing

  • tm - A comprehensive text mining framework for R.
  • openNLP - Apache OpenNLP Tools Interface.
  • koRpus - An R Package for Text Analysis.
  • zipfR - Statistical models for word frequency distributions.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 27th, 2014
item.description:
Bioinformatics and Biostatistics

  • genetics - Classes and methods for handling genetic data.
  • gap - An integrated package for genetic data analysis of both population and family data.
  • ape - Analyses of Phylogenetics and Evolution.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 24th, 2014
item.description:
Bayesian

  • coda - Output analysis and diagnostics for MCMC.
  • mcmc - Markov Chain Monte Carlo.
  • MCMCpack - Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) Package.
  • R2WinBUGS - Running WinBUGS and OpenBUGS from R / S-PLUS.
  • BRugs - R interface to the OpenBUGS MCMC software.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 22nd, 2014
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • arules - Mining Association Rules and Frequent Itemsets
  • bigrf - Big Random Forests: Classification and Regression Forests for

    • Finance

  • TTR - Functions and data to construct technical trading rules with R.
  • PerformanceAnalytics - Econometric tools for performance and risk analysis.
  • xts - eXtensible Time Series.
  • tseries - Time series analysis and computational finance.
  • fAssets - Analysing and Modelling Financial Assets.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 21st, 2014
item.description:
Reproducible Research

  • rapport - An R templating system.

    • R Development

  • packratstars360 - Make your R projects more isolated, portable, and reproducible.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 20th, 2014
item.description:
Graphic Displays

  • extrafontstars247 - Tools for using fonts in R graphics.
  • showtextstars348 - Enable R graphics device to show text using system fonts.

    • Database Management

  • RODBC - ODBC database access for R.
  • DBIstars220 - Defines a common interface between the R and database management systems.
  • RMySQL - R interface to the MySQL database.
  • ROracle - OCI based Oracle database interface for R.
  • RPostgreSQL - R interface to the PostgreSQL database system.
  • RSQLite - SQLite interface for R
  • RJDBC - Provides access to databases through the JDBC interface.

    • R Development

  • lineprofstars98 - Visualise line profiling results in R.

item.title: qinwf/awesome-R Jul 19th, 2014
item.description:
Integrated Development Environments

  • Emacs + ESS - Emacs Speaks Statistics is an add-on package for emacs text editors.
  • R Commander - A package that provides a basic graphical user interface.

    • Data Manipulation

  • tidyrstars1k - Easily tidy data with spread and gather functions.

    • Graphic Displays

  • rgl - 3D visualization device system for R.

    • Web Technologies and Services

  • RCurl - General network (HTTP/FTP/...) client interface for R.
  • httpuvstars178 - HTTP and WebSocket server library.

    • Websites

    Manuals

  • R-project - The R Project for Statistical Computing.

    • Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-awesomenessstars27.6k
  • listsstars7.3k
